## 

Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined is an SiO2 based maintenance spray that is tailored specifically for paint protection film and vinyl. Experience enhanced hydrophobicity and chemical resistance, coupled with a simplified application process for effortless use. Instantly add slickness, self-cleaning capabilities, and hydrophobic properties to your vehicle, ensuring it remains effortlessly clean and pristine. Suitable for matte and glossy finishes, it can be used as a standalone product or as a coating topper, providing unmatched versatility and protection.

Q²M PPF Maintain adds serious slickness to the surface of PPF. This slickness will aid in self cleaning and help the film reject dirt and contaminant. We want to keep the film as clean as possible, so it does not absorb contaminant over time and diminish the look of the material.

**PRO TIP: **For best results, apply Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined on a clean, dry surface or use it as a drying aid. Simply spray the product onto a plush, high-quality microfiber towel. Work it into the paint with quick, gentle motions, then wipe away any excess with a second dry towel. Remember, a little goes a long way, so avoid overusing the product to achieve optimal results.

**SUITABLE FOR MATTE PPF**: YES

**PH TOLERANCE**: 4-9

**SIO2 PERCENTAGE**: >5%

**CONTACT ANGLE**: >80'

**CONSUMPTION**: 30ml/ car

**DURABILITY:** >6 weeks

**Size Available:** 500ml
